pages.text: The backbone of item transport:$(br)$(li)$(bold)Mechanical Belt$() — drag a shaft to a shaft to span them; carries items (and you) horizontally, diagonally, or vertically.$(li)$(bold)Chute$() — vertical item pipe; pairs with fans for up/down flow.$(li)$(bold)Funnel$() — the in/out mouth between a belt/chute and an inventory. Funnels can $(bold)filter$() by item.
pages.title: Belts & Chutes

pages.text: $(li)$(bold)Depot$() — holds a single stack on a surface for a machine to act on.$(li)$(bold)Weighted Ejector$() — flings items to a target spot, with a threshold.$(li)$(bold)Smart Chute$() — a chute with a filter built in.$(br2)Filters everywhere accept an item or a $(bold)Filter$()/$(bold)Attribute Filter$() for 'any wool', 'any tool', and so on.
pages.title: Depots & Filters
